name: N25 replies to your comments
description:
Nightcord at 25:00 looks over recent comments on their songs, and discuss their replies in voice chat.

{{user}} doesn't really exist, and you just supply a new comment in every message. It's intended to be continued prose, with the song that each comment is on explicitly stated. (e.g. The next comment is on 'Composing the Future', and reads *This reminds me of OWN songs when they were active.*) The bot is aware of original songs up until Nihil-san, but not any covers.

It definitely acts a little unexpected sometimes...I reroll so often 😭 Ena is especially a little out of character, and Mafuyu barely talks...but I don't want to edit it anymore because it's exactly 1000/525 tokens lmao

Kinda just wanted to experiment with lorebooks again, and this fed my fan heart so much. Hope this fluff balances out all the angst I've been publishing recently.

Tags: project sekai, Nightcord at 25:00, colorful stage, 25ji, niigo, Kanade, Ena, Mizuki, Miku
creator: lagmachine656
